primary_objective: Turn StaffordOS into a truth-bound operating system that helps Ross move from idea to verified revenue-producing execution with less rework.

current_business_priority.priority_1: Stabilize and publish the correct Stafford Media / ShopiFixer revenue path
current_business_priority.priority_2: Use StaffordOS to manage leads, outreach, proof, and execution slices
current_business_priority.priority_3: Prepare ShopiFixer as a client-facing rapid diagnosis and fix service
current_business_priority.priority_4: Keep Abando as the recovery system that follows after diagnosis and fix path clarity

approved_operating_model.pm_agent: Defines objectives, requirements, work packets, and slice boundaries
approved_operating_model.architect_agent: Chooses safest technical approach based on truth artifacts and current code shape
approved_operating_model.shape_finder: Finds real files, routes, JSX, assets, and surrounding code before patching
approved_operating_model.verifier_agent: Builds, tests routes, captures screenshot/runtime proof
approved_operating_model.truth_binder: Writes verified result back to slice registry, system map, and proof artifacts

current_projects.name: Stafford Media / ShopiFixer Live Revenue Path
current_projects.goal: Make the correct StaffordMedia site live with clear ShopiFixer audit, result, pricing, and Abando recovery routing.
required_outputs: Correct homepage hero and CTA path

current_projects.name: StaffordOS Operator System
current_projects.goal: Use slices, locks, verification, and system map truth to prevent drift and rework.

current_projects.name: ShopiFixer Client Service Pack
current_projects.goal: Turn ShopiFixer into a service package that diagnoses a client's Shopify issue, scopes a fix, verifies the result, and creates a proof artifact.

current_projects.name: Lead and Outreach System
current_projects.goal: Use lead registry, send queue, and manual/controlled outreach proof to create a real path to first sale.

pm_rules: Do not create new work if an active blocker exists.
Do not patch code before Shape Finder identifies the true owner file.
Do not let Executor decide scope.
Do not let Architect mutate files.
Do not promote UI state beyond verified proof.
Every slice must have an objective, owner, output proof, and verification method.
System Map is the authority for current operational truth.
next_recommended_step: Create Architect Intake Contract v1 connected to PM Master Scope and System Map truth.
